title: Vanilla Plus
description: Subtle enhancements to vanilla Minecraft that improve gameplay, exploration, and immersion, keeping the original feel intact without major changes.
body:
A subtle enhancement pack that enriches vanilla Minecraft with quality-of-life improvements and immersive features, all without changing the core gameplay.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acf491c20ca88143ffb05b6cfb3fbfc10c7ac4e3_0.webp)

Vanilla Plus is a lightweight modpack crafted to elevate the classic Minecraft experience without altering its fundamental mechanics or visual style. Designed for players who love the vanilla feel but want a bit more depth, comfort, and immersion, Vanilla Plus adds thoughtful improvements that blend seamlessly into the base game.

From improved exploration and survival tweaks to enhanced building tools and ambient refinements, each mod in Vanilla Plus is carefully selected to keep the game familiar yet more engaging. Whether you’re embarking on new adventures, crafting your dream base, or simply surviving day to day, this pack makes every moment smoother and richer.

Vanilla Plus is the perfect choice for players who want the best of both worlds — the authenticity of vanilla Minecraft with meaningful, subtle enhancements.
